name: Barbarian
description: A fierce warrior who channels primal rage into unstoppable power, shrugging off blows that would fell lesser warriors.

level1Features.name: Rage
level1Features.description: As a Bonus Action, enter a rage for up to 1 minute. While raging you gain Advantage on STR checks and saves, a bonus to melee damage (+2 at L1, scaling up), and resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. Rage ends early if you don't attack or take damage on your turn. Uses: 2/Long Rest (increases with level).

level1Features.name: Unarmored Defense
level1Features.description: While not wearing armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 2 kinds of Simple or Martial weapons. You can change your chosen weapons whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Bard
description: A performer and jack-of-all-trades who weaves magic through music, inspiring allies and mystifying foes.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast bard spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. At level 1 you know 2 cantrips and 4 spells, and have 2 spell slots.

level1Features.name: Bardic Inspiration
level1Features.description: As a Bonus Action, give a creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die (d6, increases with level). Within 10 minutes they can add the result to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw. Uses = Charisma modifier (minimum 1); recovered on Long Rest.

name: Cleric
description: A priestly champion of a god, wielding divine magic to heal the wounded and smite the unholy.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast cleric spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a list of spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + your Cleric level (minimum 1). At level 1 you know 3 cantrips and have 2 spell slots.

level1Features.name: Divine Order
level1Features.description: Choose a divine order: Protector (proficiency with Martial weapons and Heavy armor) or Thaumaturge (proficiency in Arcana, and know one additional cleric cantrip).

name: Druid
description: A priest of nature who draws power from the wild world, shapeshifting into beasts and commanding the forces of nature.

level1Features.name: Druidic
level1Features.description: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can speak it and use it to leave messages, understood only by other druids.

level1Features.name: Primal Order
level1Features.description: Choose an order: Magician (proficiency in Arcana and one additional druid cantrip) or Warden (proficiency in Martial weapons and the ability to wear Medium armor made of metal, plus proficiency in Athletics or Animal Handling).

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast druid spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + your Druid level (minimum 1). At level 1 you know 2 cantrips and have 2 spell slots.

name: Fighter
description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and tactics.

level1Features.name: Fighting Style
level1Features.description: Choose a fighting style: Archery (+2 to ranged attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC while armored), Dueling (+2 melee damage with one-handed weapon), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice with two-handed weapons), Protection (impose Disadvantage on attack rolls against allies when you have a shield), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to off-hand attack damage).

level1Features.name: Second Wind
level1Features.description: As a Bonus Action, regain Hit Points equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level. Uses: 2 per Short or Long Rest.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 3 kinds of Simple or Martial weapons. You can change your chosen weapons whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Monk
description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.

level1Features.name: Martial Arts
level1Features.description: When using unarmed strikes or monk weapons: use DEX instead of STR for attack and damage rolls, roll a Martial Arts die (d6 at L1) for damage, and make one unarmed strike as a Bonus Action.

level1Features.name: Unarmored Defense
level1Features.description: While not wearing armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 1 Simple weapon. You can change your chosen weapon whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Paladin
description: A holy warrior bound by a sacred oath, combining martial prowess with divine magic.

level1Features.name: Lay on Hands
level1Features.description: You have a pool of healing power — 5 × your Paladin level in Hit Points. As a Magic action, touch a creature to restore any number of HP from the pool. Alternatively, expend 5 HP from the pool to cure one disease or neutralize one poison.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast paladin spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. You prepare spells equal to your Charisma modifier + half your Paladin level (rounded down, minimum 1). At level 1 you have 2 spell slots.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 2 kinds of Simple or Martial weapons. You can change your chosen weapons whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Ranger
description: A warrior of the wilderness, adept at tracking, hunting, and surviving in the harshest environments.

level1Features.name: Favored Enemy
level1Features.description: You always have the Hunter's Mark spell prepared. You can cast it twice per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for all Ranger spells.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast ranger spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. At level 1 you know 2 spells and have 2 spell slots. You don't learn cantrips from this class at level 1.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 2 kinds of Simple or Martial weapons. You can change your chosen weapons whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Rogue
description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies.

level1Features.name: Expertise
level1Features.description: Choose 2 of your skill proficiencies. Your Proficiency Bonus is doubled for any ability check that uses either of the chosen skills.

level1Features.name: Sneak Attack
level1Features.description: Once per turn, deal 1d6 extra damage to one creature you hit with a Finesse or Ranged weapon attack, if you have Advantage on the roll or an ally is adjacent to the target and you don't have Disadvantage. Increases by 1d6 every odd level.

level1Features.name: Thieves' Cant
level1Features.description: You know the secret language of thieves. You can understand messages hidden in mundane conversation and leave hidden messages for other rogues.

level1Features.name: Weapon Mastery
level1Features.description: You can use the Mastery property of 2 kinds of Simple or Martial weapons with the Finesse or Ranged property. You can change your chosen weapons whenever you finish a Long Rest.

name: Sorcerer
description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a wild power within, bending reality with raw arcane force.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast sorcerer spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. At level 1 you know 4 cantrips and 2 spells, and have 2 spell slots.

level1Features.name: Innate Sorcery
level1Features.description: As a Bonus Action, unleash the sorcerous power within for 1 minute. While active, you have Advantage on spell attack rolls and the saving throw DC of your spells increases by 1. Uses: 2 per Long Rest.

name: Warlock
description: A wielder of magic that is derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity, harnessing eldritch power through a pact.

level1Features.name: Eldritch Invocations
level1Features.description: You learn 1 Eldritch Invocation at level 1 (gain more at higher levels). Invocations grant you persistent magical abilities.

level1Features.name: Magical Cunning
level1Features.description: Once per Long Rest, if all your Pact Magic spell slots are expended, you can use this feature to recover half your slots (rounded up).

level1Features.name: Pact Magic
level1Features.description: You cast warlock spells using Charisma. Your Pact Magic slots recharge on a Short or Long Rest. At level 1 you know 2 cantrips and 2 spells, and have 1 spell slot of 1st level.

name: Wizard
description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of spells, unlocking the most powerful magic in existence.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You can cast wizard spells using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. At level 1 you know 3 cantrips and have a spellbook containing 6 first-level spells; you can prepare a number equal to your INT modifier + your Wizard level (minimum 1). You have 2 spell slots.

level1Features.name: Arcane Recovery
level1Features.description: Once per Long Rest, after a Short Rest, you can recover spell slots with a combined level equal to half your Wizard level (rounded up). Slots recovered this way can't be higher than 5th level.
